prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.8 kg; Height 152.1 cm; BMI 30.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.3%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 218mg/dL; 9 months ago 258mg/dL; 6 months ago 204mg/dL; 3 months ago 224mg/dL; current 221mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.3kg; 9 months ago 71.7kg; 6 months ago 69.2kg; 3 months ago 71.2kg; current 70.8kg), Height (12 months ago 152.1cm; 9 months ago 152.1cm; 6 months ago 152.1cm; 3 months ago 152.1cm; current 152.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 88mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 89mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 31mg/g; 9 months ago 45mg/g; 6 months ago 48mg/g; 3 months ago 39mg/g; current 44mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 67mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 72mg/dL; 3 months ago 74mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 158mg/dL; 3 months ago 154mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
